category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Zambia ZABS conformity, energy labelling, and import requirements.

title.en: China-to-Zambia Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入赞比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入尚比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Zambia ZABS mandatory conformity assessment, import inspection, ZS/IEC 60335-2-24 safety, energy labelling/MEPS, R-600a refrigerant handling, ZICTA radio approval (for smart models), and in-country importer requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与赞比亚ZABS强制合格评定、进口检验、ZS/IEC 60335-2-24安全、能效标识/MEPS、R-600a制冷剂处理、ZICTA无线电核准（智能型号）及本地进口商要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與尚比亞ZABS強制合格評定、進口檢驗、ZS/IEC 60335-2-24安全、能效標識/MEPS、R-600a製冷劑處理、ZICTA無線電核准（智慧型號）及本地進口商要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Zambian legislation, ZABS standards and conformity-assessment requirements, energy-efficiency programmes, and import-inspection procedures with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行赞比亚法律、ZABS标准与合格评定要求、能效计划及进口检验程序。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行尚比亞法律、ZABS標準與合格評定要求、能效計畫及進口檢驗程序。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers exporting to Zambia face several compliance gaps: (1) mandatory ZABS conformity assessment and import inspection — products must meet Zambian standards (ZS, which adopt IEC) and clear ZABS verification before customs release, and the ZABS mark applies to regulated products; (2) electrical safety to ZS/IEC 60335-2-24 — Chinese CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not automatically accepted, though IEC-based CB Scheme reports ease acceptance because Zambian standards adopt IEC; (3) energy-efficiency labelling/MEPS obligations distinct from the China Energy Label; (4) an in-country importer or representative is needed for customs and conformity; (5) for smart/connected models, ZICTA type approval of the radio module. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned. Note: Zambia uses 230 V / 50 Hz (same 50 Hz as China; nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V) and is landlocked, with imports routed via Dar es Salaam or Durban. Zambia does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regime.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商出口赞比亚面临若干合规差距：（1）强制性ZABS合格评定与进口检验——产品须符合赞比亚标准（ZS，采纳IEC）并在清关前通过ZABS核验，受监管产品适用ZABS标志；（2）依ZS/IEC 60335-2-24的电气安全——中国CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被自动接受，但基于IEC的CB体系报告因赞比亚标准采纳IEC而较易被接受；（3）有别于中国能效标识的能效标签/MEPS义务；（4）清关与合格评定需要本地进口商或代表；（5）智能/联网型号须由ZICTA对无线电模块进行型号核准。R-600a制冷剂具备良好条件。注：赞比亚采用230 V / 50 Hz（与中国同为50 Hz；标称电压有别于中国220/380 V），为内陆国，进口经达累斯萨拉姆或德班转运。赞比亚不设欧盟式横向RoHS、电池或户外噪声制度。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商出口尚比亞面臨若干合規差距：（1）強制性ZABS合格評定與進口檢驗——產品須符合尚比亞標準（ZS，採納IEC）並在清關前通過ZABS核驗，受監管產品適用ZABS標誌；（2）依ZS/IEC 60335-2-24的電氣安全——中國CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被自動接受，但基於IEC的CB體系報告因尚比亞標準採納IEC而較易被接受；（3）有別於中國能效標識的能效標籤/MEPS義務；（4）清關與合格評定需要本地進口商或代表；（5）智慧/聯網型號須由ZICTA對無線電模組進行型號核准。R-600a製冷劑具備良好條件。註：尚比亞採用230 V / 50 Hz（與中國同為50 Hz；標稱電壓有別於中國220/380 V），為內陸國，進口經達累斯薩拉姆或德班轉運。尚比亞不設歐盟式橫向RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲制度。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs not accepted. ZABS, ZICTA, ZRA, and Zambian Government Gazette are the canonical sources for Zambian requirements.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
